message.content:
Thoroughly explore the codebase to understand patterns for building a new "Floating Notes" screen. I need:

1. Read src/utils/database.ts - focus on noteDb and NoteRow types
2. Read one full self-contained view as a pattern reference (src/components/snippet_manager/snippet_manager_view.tsx)
3. Read the extension registration pattern (src/extensions/ directory - pick one example like clipboard.ts)
4. Read src/registry/types.ts for ExtensionManifest and ExtensionCommand types
5. Read src/components/icons/ to see what icons exist (particularly any notes-related icons)
6. Read src/data/ directory to see mock data patterns
7. Read src/app_types.ts for NavViewData type
8. Check what icon components are available for notes (DocumentIcon, EditIcon, etc)

Return all the relevant code snippets and patterns I need to build the Floating Notes screen.

content.text: I'll systematically explore the codebase to understand the patterns for building the Floating Notes screen. Let me start by examining the files you've requested.

9→ tags: { 10→ text: string; 11→ color?: TagColor; 12→ }[]; 13→ createdAt: Date; 14→} 15→ 16→export type SnippetCategory = SnippetEntry['category']; 17→ 18→const SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES: SnippetCategory[] = [ 19→ 'general', 20→ 'code', 21→ 'email', 22→ 'template', 23→]; 24→ 25→export function isSnippetCategory(v: string): v is SnippetCategory { 26→ return (SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES as string[]).includes(v); 27→} 28→ 29→const now = Date.now(); 30→ 31→export const SNIPPET_CATEGORIES = [ 32→ { 33→ label: 'General', 34→ value: 'general', 35→ }, 36→ { 37→ label: 'Code', 38→ value: 'code', 39→ }, 40→ { 41→ label: 'Email', 42→ value: 'email', 43→ }, 44→ { 45→ label: 'Template', 46→ value: 'template', 47→ }, 48→] as const; 1→import { type IconProps } from './icon_shared';
     2→
     3→const DEFAULTS = { size: 20 };
     4→
     5→function svgBase(props: IconProps) {
     6→  const s = props.size ?? DEFAULTS.size;
     7→  return {
     8→    width: s,
     9→    height: s,
    10→    viewBox: '0 0 20 20',
    11→    xmlns: 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',
    12→    className: props.className,
    13→  };
    14→}
    15→
    16→const WHITE_STROKE = {
    17→  stroke: '#FFFFFF',
    18→  strokeWidth: 1.5,
    19→  strokeLinecap: 'round' as const,
    20→  strokeLinejoin: 'round' as const,
    21→  fill: 'none',
    22→};
    23→
    24→export function ClipboardIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    25→  return (
    26→    <svg {...svgBase(props)}>
    27→      <defs>
    28→        <linearGradient id="clipboard-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    29→          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#FFD60A" />
    30→          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#FF9F0A" />
    31→        </linearGradient>
    32→      </defs>
    33→      <rect
    34→        x="1"
    35→        y="1"
    36→        width="18"
    37→        height="18"
    38→        rx="4"
    39→        fill="url(#clipboard-bg)"
    40→      />
    41→      <rect
    42→        x="7"
    43→        y="4"
    44→        width="6"
    45→        height="2"
    46→        rx="0.75"
    47→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    48→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    49→      />
    50→      <rect
    51→        x="5.5"
    52→        y="5.5"
    53→        width="9"
    54→        height="10"
    55→        rx="1.5"
    56→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    57→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    58→      />
    59→      <line
    60→        x1="7.5"
    61→        y1="9.5"
    62→        x2="12.5"
    63→        y2="9.5"
    64→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    65→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    66→      />
    67→      <line
    68→        x1="7.5"
    69→        y1="12"
    70→        x2="11"
    71→        y2="12"
    72→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    73→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    74→      />
    75→    </svg>
    76→  );
    77→}
    78→

    80→  return (
    81→    <svg {...svgBase(props)}>
    82→      <defs>
    83→        <linearGradient id="snippets-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    84→          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#BF5AF2" />
    85→          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#9B59B6" />
    86→        </linearGradient>
    87→      </defs>
    88→      <rect
    89→        x="1"

    97→        x="4.5"

    99→        width="11"
   100→        height="11"

   105→      <polyline
